---
name: Change Request
about: Submit a request to modify, enhance, or add a feature to an existing project
title: "[CHANGE] "
labels: "type:change-request, stage:intake"
assignees: ''
---

## What Needs to Change

**Describe the change you are requesting.**
<!-- Be specific. What feature needs to be added, modified, or removed? -->



## Why This Change Is Needed

**What is the business reason?**
<!-- What problem does this solve? What opportunity does it unlock? -->



## Current Behavior

**How does the system work today?**
<!-- Describe the current state so reviewers understand the baseline -->



## Desired Behavior

**How should the system work after this change?**
<!-- Describe the expected end state -->



## Affected Systems / Services

**What parts of the system are impacted?**
<!-- List services, APIs, databases, or UI components that will need changes -->

-

## Impact Assessment

**What is the scope of this change?**
<!-- Select one -->

- [ ] Small — Single service, no architecture impact, no data model changes
- [ ] Medium — Multiple services or minor data model changes
- [ ] Large — Architecture changes, new dependencies, or security boundary changes

## Urgency

**How urgent is this request?**
<!-- Select one -->

- [ ] P0 — Critical: Production issue or compliance blocker
- [ ] P1 — High: Needed this sprint
- [ ] P2 — Medium: Needed next sprint
- [ ] P3 — Low: Backlog

## Known Risks

**Are there any risks or concerns?**
<!-- Data migration risks, downtime, breaking changes, security implications -->



## Additional Context

**Anything else we should know?**
<!-- Attach documents, screenshots, error logs, or links to related issues -->



---

> **What happens next:** The CIO will triage this request within 2 business days. Depending on the impact assessment, this will follow the full governance lifecycle or an expedited path for small changes. You can track progress on the GitHub Projects board.
